description_long: This is a large, ornate stone fountain set within a circular paved area, surrounded by a square arrangement of stone tiles. The fountain features a multi-tiered central column adorned with sculpted lion heads, from which water appears to flow into an octagonal basin. The basin is bordered by a thick, raised rim and is filled with water, with the central structure rising prominently above it. The paving around the fountain consists of reddish-brown bricks forming a circle, which is then encircled by evenly spaced gray stone tiles. The overall design is classical, with detailed carvings and a symmetrical layout, making it a striking centerpiece for a public square or park. The fountain's substantial size and robust materials suggest it is a permanent fixture intended for outdoor urban environments.
description: A grand, stone fountain with sculpted lion heads and an octagonal basin, set within a circular brick-paved area bordered by square stone tiles. The fountain features classical ornamentation and serves as a prominent urban centerpiece.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main face of the fountain with lion head sculptures and the full octagonal basin, clearly displaying the circular brick paving and surrounding stone tiles.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the central column and the three-dimensional relief of the lion heads, with the octagonal basin and paving visible from a different perspective.
description_view_2: Rear view of the fountain, showing the back of the central column and the symmetry of the octagonal basin, with the surrounding paving pattern fully visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1 but from the other direction, emphasizing the fountain's structural details and the arrangement of the surrounding tiles.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain is adorned with sculpted lion heads on the central column, serving as decorative spouts. The column features classical motifs and relief carvings, adding an elegant and historic touch to the structure.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is octagonal with a wide, raised rim and a single tier, designed to collect and contain water from the central spouts. It is spacious and deep, with clear structural divisions between the basin and the central column.
attribute_surrounding_landscaping: The fountain is encircled by a circular area of reddish-brown brick paving, which is itself surrounded by a square grid of evenly spaced gray stone tiles. No additional landscaping or benches are visible.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: Water appears to flow from the mouths of the lion head sculptures on the central column, directed outward into the basin in a gentle, arched pattern. There are multiple jets, each corresponding to a lion head, creating a symmetrical spray effect.
